languages.text: "Совпадения в инфо-разметке... не найдены". {n}Техножрец поворачивает голову, направляя взгляд отсутствующих глаз точно на вас.{/n} "Перед вами Магос Экзальт-117, главный {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}технопровидец{/g} флагмана фон Валанциус, иденцификационный номер 11782700012. Дозволяю выполнить цель выбранной траектории. Говорите".

traits.locale_text: "Совпадения в инфо-разметке... не найдены.{n} Техножрец поворачивает голову, направляя взгляд отсутствующих глаз точно на вас.{/n} "Перед вами Магос Экзальт-117, главный {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}технопровидец{/g} флагмана фон Валанциус, иденцификационный номер 11782700012. Дозволяю выполнить цель выбранной траектории. Говорите".

languages.text: "Matches in data-index... not found." {n}The Tech-Priest turns his head, directing the gaze of his absent eyes at you.{/n} "You are addressing Magos Exalt-117, Chief {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship, identification number 11782700012. I grant you permission to fulfil the objective of the selected trajectory. Speak."

languages.text: “数据索引中……未找到匹配项。”{n}技术神甫转过头，用不存在的眼睛注视着你。{/n}“你正在与贤者尊使-117对话，冯·瓦兰修斯旗舰首席{g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}引擎先知{/g}，识别编号11782700012。我允许你执行行动目标。请讲吧。”
languages.original_text: "Matches in data-index... not found." {n}The Tech-Priest turns his head, directing the gaze of his absent eyes at you.{/n} "You are addressing Magos Exalt-117, Chief {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship, identification number 11782700012. I grant you permission to fulfil the objective of the selected trajectory. Speak."

traits.locale_text: “数据索引中……未找到匹配项。”{n}技术神甫转过头，用不存在的眼睛注视着你。{/n}“你正在与贤者尊使-117对话，冯·瓦兰修斯旗舰首席{g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}引擎先知{/g}，识别编号11782700012。我允许你执行行动目标。请讲吧。”

languages.text: « Recherche de correspondances dans l'index de données... Aucun résultat. » {n}Le technoprêtre tourne la tête et pose son regard sans yeux sur vous.{/n} « Vous vous adressez au magos Exalt-117, {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}technaugure{/g} en chef du vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius, matricule 11782700012. Je vous donne la permission de remplir l'objectif de la trajectoire sélectionnée. Parlez. »
languages.original_text: "Matches in data-index... not found." {n}The Tech-Priest turns his head, directing the gaze of his absent eyes at you.{/n} "You are addressing Magos Exalt-117, Chief {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship, identification number 11782700012. I grant you permission to fulfil the objective of the selected trajectory. Speak."

traits.locale_text: « Recherche de correspondances dans l'index de données... Aucun résultat. » {n}Le technoprêtre tourne la tête et pose son regard sans yeux sur vous.{/n} « Vous vous adressez au magos Exalt-117, {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}technaugure{/g} en chef du vaisseau amiral de la maison von Valancius, matricule 11782700012. Je vous donne la permission de remplir l'objectif de la trajectoire sélectionnée. Parlez. »

languages.text: "Veri dizininde eşleşme... Bulunamadı." {n}Tekno Rahip, başını çevirerek var olmayan gözlerini sana yöneltiyor.{/n} "Şu anda von Valancius sancak gemisinin Baş {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Mühedyumu{/g}, 11782700012 kimlik numaralı Magos Yüce-117 ile konuşuyorsunuz. Seçilen rotanın mevcut hedefini gerçekleştirmenize izin veriyorum. Konuşun."
languages.original_text: "Matches in data-index... not found." {n}The Tech-Priest turns his head, directing the gaze of his absent eyes at you.{/n} "You are addressing Magos Exalt-117, Chief {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship, identification number 11782700012. I grant you permission to fulfil the objective of the selected trajectory. Speak."

traits.locale_text: "Veri dizininde eşleşme... Bulunamadı. {n}Tekno Rahip, başını çevirerek var olmayan gözlerini sana yöneltiyor.{/n} "Şu anda von Valancius sancak gemisinin Baş {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Mühedyumu{/g}, 11782700012 kimlik numaralı Magos Yüce-117 ile konuşuyorsunuz. Seçilen rotanın mevcut hedefini gerçekleştirmenize izin veriyorum. Konuşun."

languages.text: «Coincidencias con el índice de datos... no encontradas». {n}El tecnosacerdote gira la cabeza para llevar la mirada de sus ojos ausentes hacia ti.{/n} «Se dirige al magos Exaltado-117, {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}visioingeniero{/g} jefe de la nave insignia von Valancius, número de identificación 11782700012. Le concedo permiso para cumplir el objetivo de la trayectoria seleccionada. Hable».
languages.original_text: "Matches in data-index... not found." {n}The Tech-Priest turns his head, directing the gaze of his absent eyes at you.{/n} "You are addressing Magos Exalt-117, Chief {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship, identification number 11782700012. I grant you permission to fulfil the objective of the selected trajectory. Speak."

traits.locale_text: «Coincidencias con el índice de datos... no encontradas». {n}El tecnosacerdote gira la cabeza para llevar la mirada de sus ojos ausentes hacia ti.{/n} «Se dirige al magos Exaltado-117, {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}visioingeniero{/g} jefe de la nave insignia von Valancius, número de identificación 11782700012. Le concedo permiso para cumplir el objetivo de la trayectoria seleccionada. Hable».

languages.text: "Übereinstimmungen in Datenindex ... nicht gefunden." {n}Der Techpriester dreht seinen Kopf und richtet den Blick seiner nicht vorhandenen Augen auf dich.{/n} "Ihr sprecht mit Magos Exalt-117, leitender {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Maschinenseher{/g} des Flaggschiffs derer von Valancius, Identifikationsnummer 11782700012. Ich gewähre Euch die Erlaubnis, das Ziel der gewählten Trajektorie zu erfüllen. Sprecht."
languages.original_text: "Matches in data-index... not found." {n}The Tech-Priest turns his head, directing the gaze of his absent eyes at you.{/n} "You are addressing Magos Exalt-117, Chief {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Enginseer{/g} of the von Valancius flagship, identification number 11782700012. I grant you permission to fulfil the objective of the selected trajectory. Speak."

traits.locale_text: "Übereinstimmungen in Datenindex ... nicht gefunden. {n}Der Techpriester dreht seinen Kopf und richtet den Blick seiner nicht vorhandenen Augen auf dich.{/n} "Ihr sprecht mit Magos Exalt-117, leitender {g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}Maschinenseher{/g} des Flaggschiffs derer von Valancius, Identifikationsnummer 11782700012. Ich gewähre Euch die Erlaubnis, das Ziel der gewählten Trajektorie zu erfüllen. Sprecht."

languages.text: 「データ・インデックスに一致するマッチが見つかりません。」{n}テクプリストが首を傾げ、視線をあなたに向ける。{/n}「あなたはマゴス・エクサルト117、フォン・ヴァランシウス旗艦のチーフ・{g|Encyclopedia:Enginseer}エンジニア{/g}、識別番号11782700012に話しかけています。選択された軌道の目的を達成する許可を与えます。話してください。」
